Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.commons

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.commons
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons
 
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart
 
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl
Simple Variable Language
org.apache.juneau.http
HTTP Part Annotations
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header
HTTP Header Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.response
HTTP Response Exception Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.remote
Remote REST API
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.objecttools
Java Object Tools
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support

Predefined Microservice Resources

Remote REST API

REST Server API

REST Interface Helper Classes
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.remote
Remote service API
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons used by org.apache.juneau.commons
    Class
    Description
    AnnotationObject
    A concrete implementation of a Java annotation that can be created programmatically at runtime.
    AnnotationObject.Builder
    Builder for AnnotationObject objects.
    AppliedAnnotationObject
    An implementation of an annotation that can be dynamically applied to classes, methods, fields, and constructors at runtime.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.Builder
    Builder for AppliedAnnotationObject objects.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderC
    Builder for applied annotations targeting constructors.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderM
    Builder for applied annotations targeting methods.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderMF
    Builder for applied annotations targeting methods and fields.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderT
    Builder for applied annotations targeting classes.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTM
    Builder for applied annotations targeting classes and methods.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTMF
    Builder for applied annotations targeting classes, methods, and fields.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTMFC
    Builder for applied annotations targeting classes, methods, fields, and constructors.
    BasicRuntimeException
    Subclass of runtime exceptions that take in a message and zero or more arguments.
    InvalidAnnotationException
    Defines an invalid usage of an annotation.
